lemma hasCondDistrib_action (alg : Algorithm őĪ R) (őĹ : Kernel őĪ R) [IsMarkovKernel őĹ] (n : ‚Ąē) :
    HasCondDistrib (action alg (n + 1))
      (fun ŌČ (i : Iic n) ‚Ü¶ (action alg i ŌČ, reward alg i ŌČ))
      (alg.policy n) (arrayMeasure őĹ) := by
  convert hasCondDistrib_action' alg őĹ n with ŌČ i
  ¬∑ simp only [action]
    rw [hist_eq _ _ n]
  ¬∑ simp only [reward]
    rw [hist_eq _ _ n]

lemma hasCondDistrib_reward (alg : Algorithm őĪ R) (őĹ : Kernel őĪ R) [IsMarkovKernel őĹ]
    (n : ‚Ąē) :
    HasCondDistrib (reward alg (n + 1))
      (fun ŌČ ‚Ü¶ (fun (i : Iic n) ‚Ü¶ (action alg i ŌČ, reward alg i ŌČ), action alg (n + 1) ŌČ))
      ((stationaryEnv őĹ).feedback n) (arrayMeasure őĹ) := by
  convert hasCondDistrib_reward' alg őĹ n with ŌČ i
  ¬∑ simp only [action]
    rw [hist_eq _ _ n]
  ¬∑ simp only [reward]
    rw [hist_eq _ _ n]

lemma isAlgEnvSeq_arrayMeasure (alg : Algorithm őĪ R) (őĹ : Kernel őĪ R) [IsMarkovKernel őĹ] :
    IsAlgEnvSeq (action alg) (reward alg) alg (stationaryEnv őĹ) (arrayMeasure őĹ) where
  hasLaw_action_zero := hasLaw_action_zero alg őĹ
  hasCondDistrib_reward_zero := hasCondDistrib_reward_zero alg őĹ
  hasCondDistrib_action := hasCondDistrib_action alg őĹ
  hasCondDistrib_reward := hasCondDistrib_reward alg őĹ

end ArrayModel

end MeasureSpace

end Bandits
